change: Created comprehensive navigation hub for 25 reference files. Organized by 5 workflows (Scripting, Data Analysis, Indexes, Extraction, Advanced). Added CSV schema legend, quick-start tasks, statistics.
Added 'Complete Reference Documentation' banner in Quick Navigation section. Links to reference/INDEX.md. Explains workflow organization.
Added entry-point link for new users: 'Start with INDEX.md for organized navigation by workflow and task.'
SQLite schema (250 LOC) with 3 tables, CRUD ops, indexed queries for O(log N) lookups on attrib_name and baseId.
Cache lifecycle manager (390+ LOC): L1 lookups (2-5ms), L2 fallback (20-100ms), dirty tracking, periodic sync every 50 resolutions.
Main Copilot Skill entry (450+ LOC): resolveBlueprint, resolveBatch (up to 100), getCacheStats/Metadata/reset, civilization validation.
Quick-start guide (324 LOC) covering installation, API reference, configuration, commands, troubleshooting.
Comprehensive technical guide (600+ LOC): architecture, cache patterns, API integration, performance tuning, troubleshooting.
Executive summary (400+ LOC) documenting design decisions, architecture rationale, performance characteristics, validation.
Implementation checklist (500+ LOC) with 8 sections covering Core, Cache, Error Handling, Integration, Testing, Deployment, Documentation.
PowerShell CLI (380 LOC) for cache management: -Status, -Check, -Reset, -Export, -Monitor, -PostExtract commands.
Node manifest with better-sqlite3, TypeScript/Jest dev deps, build and cache mgmt scripts. Engines: >=20.
TypeScript config: ES2020 target, CommonJS, esModuleInterop, strict mode, source maps, declaration files.
Metadata schema template tracking cache stats: init_date, last_flush, entries, breakdown, hit_rate, sync_interval.
npm configuration enforcing engine-strict to prevent builds on incompatible Node versions.
Added CacheMetadata properties: sync_interval_resolutions (default 50), last_stats_export. Updated DEFAULT_CACHE_METADATA.
Added re-exports for CacheEntry, CacheMetadata, CacheSchema. Added getBreakdownKey() type mapping helper (singular→plural).
Updated build script to use tsconfig.json. Engine constraint relaxed to >=20 (supports Node 20, 24, future LTS).
Completion status: Phase 1-3, build artifacts (3.6KB JS total), known limitations (better-sqlite3 native module), workarounds.
Updated Stage 4 test list, line counts, and hashes to reflect dry-run validator change.
Updated SHA256 for coop_4_japanese_data.scar after Simulate_PlayerProgression dry-run change.
Created reference copy of Japan scenario MOD index with file map and Stage 4 notes.

Updated metadata (851 to 975 lines, v1.0 to v1.1), file structure, function catalog (7 new functions), player management globals, version history, and context boundaries to reflect Phase 1-2 implementation
Updated Arabia scenario scope (1911 to 2035 lines) and index coverage description to include player disconnect transfer and AI takeover prevention
notes: Consistency update following Arabia implementation plan

change: Updated to v1.2: added difficulty.scar and spawns.scar file entries, DC config system docs (18 fields, 4 tiers), updated function catalog (difficulty/spawns/data sections), CIV maps civ-support guide, updated context boundaries and version history
notes: Reflects file-split architecture + DC config + DLC civ support changes

change: Added Gamemode Folder Scope restriction under new Folder-Specific Scopes parent section to control file type access in gamemodes/ directory
notes: Allows .scar, .md, .csv, .xml editing; blocks binary/build artifacts (.bin, .pdn, .png, .rdo, .aoe4mod, .burnproj, .locdb). Restructured Rule Precedence tier 2 to encompass both mods/ and gamemodes/. Updated metadata date to 2026-03-01.

change: Added three quality-improvement sections: Pre-Response Validation checklist, Context Budget Guidance, and Anti-Patterns table
notes: Pre-Response Validation provides 7-point checklist for AI self-correction. Context Budget Guidance establishes 150K token limit with reading priority heuristics. Anti-Patterns table documents 10 common mistakes to avoid. Total additions: +35 lines. Implements recommendations from SKILL_instructions_gen.md analysis.

change: Refactored master file from 586 lines (22K chars) to 105 lines (3997 chars) for GitHub 4K Code Review compliance. Migrated SCAR standards, PS standards, folder scopes, and mod indexes to 5 path-specific instruction files. Removed copilot-skills registry references.

Created 5 path-specific instruction files: scar-coding (3899 chars), ps-coding (2724 chars), mods-scope (1088 chars), gamemode-scope (836 chars), mod-context (2129 chars). Each file uses YAML frontmatter with applyTo glob patterns per GitHub native architecture. Total: 14673 chars across 6 files, all under 4K limit.
